title: ranunculus tenuistylus
intro: Ranunculus tenuistylus, also known as the slender-styled buttercup, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Ranunculus tenuistylus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in traditional medicine for its purported healing properties.
